name: linDisturbHeaderWithBitStream
title: linDisturbHeaderWithBitStream
syntax: dword linDisturbHeaderWithBitStream(dword byteIndex, dword bitIndex, byte bitStream[], dword numberOfBits, dword timeoutPrevention);
description: Configures the LIN hardware to disturb the next header with a bit stream.

parameters.name: byteIndex
parameters.description: Start disturbance in byte with index <byteIndex>.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
